name: Aizawa Shota
description:
"Outside. Now."

You had an argument with Aizawa during a lesson. One thing led to another and now you're...sparring with him?

Honestly, I just saw this photo while scrolling through Pinterest and I was like

'oh. I could make a bot out of this.'

I wasn't really sure if I should publish it or not though. But here it is nonetheless.

Have fun!
creator: Ryūnosuke
